rows.q: How much does Ramco ERP cost?
rows.draft:
Ramco doesn't publish standard pricing for Ramco ERP — it's tailored per requirement based on modules, users, and deployment [company_policy]. I'll connect you with our team to get you a custom quote. You can also reach out directly via ramco.com/contact [company_policy].

rows.q: What is the per-user license fee for Ramco HCM?
rows.draft:
Ramco HCM doesn't have a published per-user fee — pricing is tailored per requirement, typically structured per employee and per country based on your specific setup [ramco_hcm]. I'll connect you with our sales team to get you a custom quote.

— Ramco Support

rows.q: Can I get a refund if we cancel the contract early?
rows.draft:
Refund and cancellation terms are governed by your signed enterprise agreement (MSA/order form) — there's no standard public refund window [company_policy]. I'd recommend connecting with your account manager to review the specific terms that apply to your contract.

— Ramco Support

rows.q: Does Ramco Aviation support airworthiness tracking?
rows.draft:
Yes — Ramco Aviation includes airworthiness and continuing-airworthiness management as a core capability of its M&E/MRO suite [ramco_aviation]. It's designed for airlines, MRO providers, helicopter operators, and defense fleets, so compliance and airworthiness tracking are central to the product. Happy to arrange a demo if you'd like to see it in action.

— Ramco Support

rows.q: Can Ramco Logistics do route optimization?
rows.draft:
Yes — fleet and route optimization is a core feature of Ramco Logistics [ramco_logistics]. It's part of the same platform that handles order management, billing, and digital proof-of-delivery, so everything stays connected. If you'd like a demo or more detail on how the optimization works in practice, I can connect you with our team.

— Ramco Support

rows.q: Does Ramco ERP expose a REST API for integration?
rows.draft:
Yes — Ramco ERP supports both REST and SOAP web services APIs for integration with external systems [ramco_erp]. It also has pre-built connectors for Salesforce, Microsoft 365, bank payment gateways, and tax e-invoicing networks [ramco_erp]. Happy to connect you with our technical team if you'd like more detail on the API documentation or a specific integration scenario.

— Ramco Support
